en.value: Activity 1.1.1: Support to improve safe and inclusive school learning environment including school facility in coordination with government.  Activity 1.1.2: Support to improve knowledge and skills of Teachers, SMC/PTA and student on WASH, MHM, DRR and Comprehensive School Safety.Activity 1.1.3: Support to identify children with disabilities and their easy access to educationActivity 1.1.4: Support to development of Model Classroom together with teachers' competency development in its managementActivity 1.1.5: Support to improve teacher's capacity on disability identification, inclusive classroom management and remedial and alternative learning class facilitationActivity 1.1.6: Support to integrate STEAM approach in education and improve STEAM facilitiesActivity 1.1.7: Support schools and Local Government for strengthening inclusive governance structure via developing/updating gender responsive inclusive education policies and plans. (Same 5 R/M in five year)Activity 1.2.1:  Awareness to parents, community and children engagement in education for improving children's access to quality learning achievement.Activity 1.2.2: Support to identify Out of School children and their entry and re-entry in school.Activity 1.3.1:  Provide soft skill training (Life skills, protection, gender equality, decent work) training  to program participantsActivity 1.3.2: Provide micro-enterprise/business skills development trainingActivity 1.3.3:  Provide vocational skill training as per market demand and local need including promotion of green job and enterpriseActivity 1.3.4:  Provide business start-up support Activity 1.3.5:  Provide marketing strategy/market linkage through digital and non-digital medium.Activity 1.3.6: Provide mentoring, coaching and career counselling and technical backstopping supportActivity 1.3.7: Support/linkage youth with cooperative for saving and creditActivity 1.4.1:  Orientation to potential employers on decent work and gender equalityActivity 1.4.2:  Orientation to training provider on women friendly training delivery modalitiesActivity 1.4.3:  Establish media partnership on decent work and gender equalityActivity 1.4.4: Provide gender equality training to parents and conduct intergenerational dialogue to make conducive environment for young women.Activity 1.4.5: Childcare facility provision to young mother beneficiariesActivity 2.1.1: Training to health workers & FCHV on Parenting Education, WASH, Nutrition and male engagement package (Output code 2121)  Activity 2.1.2: Deliver mechanism, 6 key hygiene messages and safe WASH to health importance (Output code 2421)  Activity 2.1.4: Functionality of Health Mothers Group meeting as per government protocols to promote nurturing collective dialogue on nurturing care (Nutrition and child health) for health workers and Nutrition facilitators (Output code 2121)Activity 2..2.2: Conduct SBCC sessions on maternal child health & nutrition by nutrition facilitators (Output code 2121) Activity 2..2.3: Community-led campaigns on promotion of nurturing care focused on nutrition and gender responsive parenting (Output code 2121)Activity 2..2.4: Support for refurbishment of community-based WASH service system and clean drinking water for vulnerable families/community (output code: 2421)Activity 2..2.5: Orientation to WASH Champions to promote community led total sanitation (Output code 2421)Activity 2.3.1: Establish child play centers at health facilities & community level (different play toys, visual aid, play station set up) (Output code 2121)Activity 2.3.2: Support to Zero malnutrition campaign and promote nutrition friendly local government (Output code 2113)Activity 2.3.3: Support to establish OTC (Outpatient Therapeutic Care) centers at health centers for Integrated Management of Acute Malnutrition (IMAM) (Output code 2114)Activity 2.3.4: Support to strengthening of local level ECD committee and prepare ECD strategic plan as guided by national ECD strategyActivity 2.4.1: Collaborative engagement with local and province governments (child rights committees and judicial committees) and protection actors on protection related system establishment and policy formulation. Activity 2.4.2: Conduct capacity building events for team and stakeholders on protection, WASH, DRR, CPiEActivity
